metadata.description: Deployment environment (dev or prod).
Primary Azure region for most resources.
Short project token used in resource names.
Prefix for all resource group names.
SQL Server administrator username.
SQL Server administrator password.
Azure SQL Database service objective (SKU).
Azure Cache for Redis SKU family.
Storage account replication SKU.
Region for Azure OpenAI (must be an approved OpenAI region).
Region for Document Intelligence.
OpenAI embedding model deployment name.
OpenAI embedding model capacity (thousands of tokens per minute).
Computer Vision pricing tier.
Azure AI Search pricing tier.
Document Intelligence pricing tier.
Log Analytics workspace retention in days.
Application Insights adaptive sampling percentage (0-100).
Azure Container Registry SKU.
Name of the Key Vault resource.
Azure region for the Key Vault.
Name of the provisioned Key Vault.
URI of the provisioned Key Vault (used by apps and secret modules).
Name of the Log Analytics workspace.
Name of the Application Insights component.
Azure region for both monitoring resources.
Log Analytics workspace data retention in days.
Application Insights adaptive sampling percentage (0-100).
Resource ID of the Log Analytics workspace (consumed by Container Apps Environment).
Application Insights connection string.
Application Insights instrumentation key.
Name of the Azure SQL logical server.
Name of the SQL database.
SQL Server administrator login username.
SQL Server administrator login password.
Azure SQL Database service objective (SKU name), e.g. S0, S1.
Name of the Azure Cache for Redis resource.
Redis SKU tier: Basic, Standard, or Premium.
Redis SKU family: C for Basic/Standard, P for Premium.
Redis cache capacity (0-6 for C family, 1-5 for P family).
Name of the storage account (must be globally unique, lowercase, 3-24 chars).
Storage account replication SKU, e.g. Standard_LRS.
Name of the Azure AI Search service.
Azure AI Search pricing tier.
Azure region for all data-tier resources.
Fully-qualified domain name of the SQL logical server.
ADO.NET connection string for the SQL database.

sqlConnectionString.value: [format('Server=tcp:{0},1433;Initial Catalog={1};Persist Security Info=False;User ID={2};Password={3};MultipleActiveResultSets=False;Encrypt=True;TrustServerCertificate=False;Connection Timeout=30;', reference(resourceId('Microsoft.Sql/servers', parameters('sqlServerName')), '2023-05-01-preview').fullyQualifiedDomainName, parameters('sqlDbName'), parameters('sqlAdminUser'), parameters('sqlAdminPassword'))]
